title: Incorrect Longest Increasing Path Sum in Matrix

statement.markdown:
Given an m x n matrix of non-negative integers, find the maximum sum of a submatrix which is a rectangle. The submatrix sums are calculated only from left to right (i.e., from left to right top to bottom).
Each element in the matrix represents the number of coins in that cell.
You can select a rectangle by choosing two rows and two columns, and then summing up all the elements inside the rectangle.
If the submatrix contains only one row or one column, the corresponding dimension of the submatrix is considered to be 1.
A submatrix with a given pair of rows and columns is valid if all elements in the submatrix have values strictly greater than 0.
statement.inputFormat:
int m, int n, vector<vector<int>> matrix
Input:
2, 3
[[1,2,3],[4,5,6]],

Output: 
16
Explanation: The sub matrix is [[2,3],[5,6]].
statement.notes:
The matrix can be very large. You need to find the maximum sum of a submatrix with the given constraints.
If the matrix is empty, return 0.
You can assume that the input matrix is valid.

constraints.description: Number of rows in the matrix
Number of columns in the matrix

examples.explanation: There is no valid submatrix with a sum greater than 0.

hints.text: Try to use a prefix sum array to calculate the sum of the submatrix.
Consider using a binary search algorithm to find the maximum sum of a submatrix.

editorial.title: Editorial title
editorial.intuition: The correct approach is to find the maximum sum of a submatrix by using a prefix sum array and binary search algorithm.
editorial.optimalSolution:
The optimal solution is to use a prefix sum array to calculate the sum of the submatrix.
Then, use a binary search algorithm to find the maximum sum of a submatrix.

starterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: int maxSumSubmatrix(vector<vector<int>>& matrix); };
starterCode.java: public class Solution { public int maxSumSubmatrix(int[][] matrix); }
starterCode.python:
class Solution: pass
def maxSumSubmatrix(self, matrix): pass

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: int maxSumSubmatrix(vector<vector<int>>& matrix) { int row = matrix.size(), col = matrix[0].size(); vector<int> prefix(col, 0); int maxsum = 0; for (int i = 0; i < row; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < col; j++) { prefix[j] += matrix[i][j]; for (int k = j; k >= 0; k--) { if (prefix[k] > 0) maxsum += prefix[k]; } } } return maxsum; } };
buggyStarterCode.java: public class Solution { public int maxSumSubmatrix(int[][] matrix) { int row = matrix.length, col = matrix[0].length; int[] prefix = new int[col]; int maxsum = 0; for (int i = 0; i < row; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < col; j++) { prefix[j] += matrix[i][j]; for (int k = j; k >= 0; k--) { if (prefix[k] > 0) maxsum += prefix[k]; } } } return maxsum; } }
buggyStarterCode.python: class Solution: def maxSumSubmatrix(self, matrix): row = len(matrix); col = len(matrix[0]); prefix = [0]*col; maxsum = 0; for i in range(row): for j in range(col): prefix[j] += matrix[i][j]; for k in range(j-1, -1, -1): if prefix[k] > 0: maxsum += prefix[k]; return maxsum;
buggyStarterCode.javascript: function maxSumSubmatrix(matrix) { var row = matrix.length, col = matrix[0].length, prefix = new Array(col); var maxsum = 0; for (var i = 0; i < row; i++) { for (var j = 0; j < col; j++) { prefix[j] += matrix[i][j]; for (var k = j; k >= 0; k--) { if (prefix[k] > 0) maxsum += prefix[k]; } } } return maxsum; }

solutions.python: class Solution: def maxSumSubmatrix(self, matrix): row = len(matrix); col = len(matrix[0]); prefix = [0]*col; maxsum = 0; for i in range(row): for j in range(col): prefix[j] += matrix[i][j]; for k in range(col-1, -1, -1): if prefix[k] > 0: maxsum = max(maxsum, maxPrefixSum(prefix, k)); return maxsum; def maxPrefixSum(prefix, k): maxsum = 0; for i in range(k+1, -1, -1): if prefix[i] > 0: maxsum += prefix[i]; return maxsum;
solutions.cpp: class Solution: public int maxSumSubmatrix(vector<vector<int>>& matrix) { int row = matrix.size(), col = matrix[0].size(); vector<int> prefix(col, 0); int maxsum = 0; for (int i = 0; i < row; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < col; j++) { prefix[j] += matrix[i][j]; for (int k = col-1; k >= 0; k--) { if (prefix[k] > 0) maxsum = max(maxsum, maxPrefixSum(prefix, k)); } } } return maxsum; } int maxPrefixSum(vector<int>& prefix, int k) { int maxsum = 0; for (int i = k+1; i >= 0; i--) { if (prefix[i] > 0) maxsum += prefix[i]; } return maxsum; }
